sqlCommand.descr: delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 = 0
update TransX set Amt2 = 0, Amt3 = 0, Flex9 = 'n', Yr = 999, Period = 999 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'

update TransX set Amt4 = (case when GL < '4000000' then round(-Amt1,2) else Amt1 end) from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and not (Co >= '2001' and Co <= '2008' and TP >= '2200' and TP <= '2450' and not TP = '2210')
update TransX set BusCat = '' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and BusCat = 'XX'
update TransX set GLdesc = c.Name from TransX t inner join COA c on t.GL = c.GL where KeyID = '[batchID]'

update TransX set TPname = p.Name, Flex1 = p.SchedYname, Yr = p.SchedYrow, Flex5 = p.NAIC, Flex6 = p.FedID, Flex7 = p.OneStreamID from TransX t inner join TPs p on t.TP = p.TP where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set Flex2 = p.SchedYname, Period = p.SchedYrow, Flex8 = p.OneStreamID from TransX t inner join TPs p on t.Co = p.TP where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set Flex4 = (case when BusCat >= '10' and BusCat <= '29' then 'A' else 'C' end) from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set Flex3 = m.Field1, Qtr = m.Field2 from TransX t inner join Misc_Tables m on substring(t.GL,1,3) = m.Descr where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Table_ID = 'Sched Y' and ID = 'GL'

update TransX set Amt2 = (case when GL < 4000000 or substring(GL,1,2) = '42' then round(0-Amt1,2) else Amt1 end) from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and not (Co >= '2001' and Co <= '2008' and TP >= '2001' and TP <= '2450' and not TP = '2210')
update TransX set Amt3 = round(0-Amt2,2) from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'

update TransX set Flex1 = n.Field1, Flex3 = m.Field1, Qtr = m.Field2, Yr = m.Field3 from TransX t inner join Misc_Tables m on t.GL = m.Descr and m.Table_ID = 'Sched Y' and m.ID = 'GL2' inner join Misc_Tables n on m.Field3 = n.Descr and n.Table_ID = 'Sched Y' and n.ID = 'Names' where KeyID = '[batchID]'

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co,TP,Amt2,Amt3,Flex1,Yr,Qtr,Flex2,Period,Flex7,Flex8,Flex9,Flex4) (select KeyID,TP,Co,Amt3,Amt2,Flex2,Period,Qtr,Flex1,Yr,Flex8,Flex7, 'n' as Flex9, (case when Flex4 = 'A' then 'C' else 'A' end) as Flex4 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co >= '2200' and Co <= '2450' and TP >= '2001' and TP <= '2008' )

insert into TransX (KeyID, GL, Gldesc, Co, Flex1, Flex4, Flex9, Qtr, Amt2, Amt3) (select KeyID, '4000000' as GL, 'Colm 9' as GLdesc, Co, SchedYname, Flex4, 'n' as Flex9, 9 as Qtr, round(-sum(Amt2),2) as Amt2, round(-sum(Amt3),2) as Amt3 from TransX t inner join TPs p on t.Co = p.TP where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Qtr = 9 group by KeyID,Co,SchedYname,Flex4)

insert into TransX (KeyID, GL, Gldesc, Co, Flex1, Flex4, Flex9, Qtr, Amt2, Amt3) (select KeyID, '1000000' as GL, 'Colm 13' as GLdesc, Co, SchedYname, Flex4, 'n' as Flex9, 13 as Qtr,round(-sum(Amt2),2) as Amt2,round(-sum(Amt3),2) as Amt3 from TransX t inner join TPs p on t.Co = p.TP where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Qtr = 13 group by KeyID,Co,SchedYname,Flex4)

insert into TransX (KeyID, Amt4,Flex1,Yr,Qtr,Flex2,Period,Flex7,Flex8,Flex9) (select KeyID,round(0-Amt4,2) as Amt4,Flex2,Period,Qtr,Flex1,Yr,Flex8,Flex7, 'z' as Flex9 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and not GL in ('1000000','4000000') )

insert into TransX (KeyID, Yr,Flex1,Flex5,Flex6,Period,Flex2,Flex9,Qtr,Amt1) (select '[batchID]' as KeyID,Descr,Field1,Field2,Field3,Descr,Field1,'y' as Flex9, 9 as Qtr, 0 as Amt1 from Misc_Tables where Table_ID = 'Sched Y' and ID = 'Names')

insert into TransX (KeyID, Yr,Flex1,Flex5,Flex6,Period,Flex2,Flex9,Qtr,Amt1) (select '[batchID]' as KeyID,Descr,Field1,Field2,Field3,Descr,Field1,'y' as Flex9,13 as Qtr,0 as Amt1 from Misc_Tables where Table_ID = 'Sched Y' and ID = 'Names')
update TransX set Flex5 = m.Field2, Flex6 = m.Field3 from TransX t inner join Misc_Tables m on Yr = m.Descr where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Table_ID = 'Sched Y' and ID = 'Names'

sqlSelect.descr: insert into TransX (KeyID, GL,Co, TP, BusCat, Amt1) values ('[batchID]',
